description_long: This guard rail consists of a horizontal top rail supported by evenly spaced vertical posts, all constructed from what appears to be a dark, metallic material. The design is simple and utilitarian, with a rectangular frame and cylindrical or slightly rounded vertical bars. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or special end treatment. The surface finish is smooth and slightly reflective, suggesting a powder-coated or painted metal, likely steel or aluminum. There are no visible decorative elements, fasteners, or reflective markings, making it suitable for functional use in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots.
description: A dark metal guard rail with a smooth finish, featuring a rectangular frame and evenly spaced vertical bars. The ends are blunt and the design is utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, top rail, and all vertical bars clearly.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile and thickness of the rail, with vertical bars aligned edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same frame and vertical bars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and thickness of the rail.
